description: An interactive scrollytelling marketing page showcasing the WellFi wireless downhole monitoring system for oil and gas engineers.

userStories.title: Project Foundation Setup
userStories.description: Initialize Next.js 14 project with App Router, Tailwind CSS, and core dependencies
acceptanceCriteria: Tailwind CSS installed and configured with WellFi design tokens
Basic folder structure created per CLAUDE.md

userStories.title: Design System Constants
userStories.description: Create constants file with WellFi colors, typography, and product specifications
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette defined in Tailwind config
Section content as typed data structures

userStories.title: Base Layout and Global Styles
userStories.description: Create root layout with metadata, fonts, and global styles
acceptanceCriteria: Root layout with proper HTML structure
Global CSS with dark theme base

userStories.title: Section 1: Hero Component
userStories.description: Build the hero section with tagline, headline, and subtle animation

userStories.title: Section 2: Wireless Alternative (Benefits Grid)
userStories.description: Create icon grid showing benefits with minimal text
acceptanceCriteria: Icons: Instant data, SCADA-ready, 5+ year battery, Through-casing, Minimal rig time, Potential Uplift, Increased Pump Life

userStories.title: Section 3: Technology Explanation
userStories.description: Technical credibility section with EM telemetry diagram
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: gauge on tubing, fiberglass collar, EM signal path, surface detection
Technical terms: low-frequency EM, proprietary signal processing

userStories.title: Section 4: Product Explorer (Scrollytelling)
userStories.description: Interactive tool assembly walkthrough triggered by scroll
acceptanceCriteria: Each component shows name + one-line purpose
Components: Signal Collar, Electronics Sonde, Battery Barrel, PEEK Clamp, Fiberglass Collar

userStories.title: Section 5: Installation Process
userStories.description: Show how simple installation is during workover
acceptanceCriteria: Step icons: Makeup on surface → Run with tubing → Connect surface box
Key points: No cable strapping, Adds minutes not hours

userStories.title: Section 6: SCADA Integration
acceptanceCriteria: System flow diagram: Wellhead → Surface Box → RTU → SCADA

userStories.title: Section 7: DeltaPressure Intelligence
acceptanceCriteria: Animated timeline showing monitoring vs transmission
Visual: continuous monitoring (subtle), scheduled transmission (pulse), exception alert (highlight)
Key phrases: Continuous surveillance, Threshold-based alerting, Battery-optimized

userStories.title: Section 8: Results and Credibility
acceptanceCriteria: Before/After comparison: blind operation vs real-time monitoring
Fluid level visualization (head dropping without vs maintained with)
Key phrases: Less Downtime, Fewer Workovers, Optimized Production
No specific percentages without solid attribution

userStories.title: Section 9: Technical Specifications
userStories.description: Clean spec table for engineers who want details

userStories.title: Section 10: Call to Action
acceptanceCriteria: Two CTA buttons: 'Contact Us Now', 'Download Tech Sheet'

userStories.title: Scroll Progress Indicator
acceptanceCriteria: Thin progress bar at top or side
Smooth animation tied to scroll position

userStories.title: Section Entrance Animations
userStories.description: Add staggered entrance animations to all sections
acceptanceCriteria: Each section fades/slides in on scroll into view

userStories.title: Mobile Responsiveness Audit
acceptanceCriteria: Scrollytelling sections work on touch devices

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Project setup, design system, and base infrastructure

phases.name: Static Sections
phases.description: Build out each section with static content

phases.name: Animation Polish
phases.description: Add entrance animations and scroll effects
